metadata.description: Fernando Kalid's toolkit — Claude skills, agents, artifacts, and style systems. Utilities for excellence.

plugins.name: fk-decks
plugins.description: Branded presentation generators (.pptx, Google Slides compatible): FERNANDO KALID personal brand, OPHIRA, and THE SUCCESS PLANNER — each with its full design system, components, and logos.

plugins.name: business-case
plugins.description: Three-phase business case system: Research (market audit with consulting-grade rigor) → Strategy (Go / No-Go / Pivot decision) → Activation (unit economics, GTM, 90-day roadmap). English & Spanish.

plugins.name: comms-studio
plugins.description: Marketing & communication suite: nine-module Communication & Media Strategy builder, campaign development with a seven-test quality gate, and consent-based UX copywriting (anti-dark-pattern).
